_comment: Prompts used for training data generation and model evaluation. Eval test cases must NOT appear in training_topics.
instruction_templates: Build a self-contained HTML page for {topic}.
Write a complete single-file HTML + CSS + JS website that implements {topic}.
Generate a responsive single-file HTML website for {topic}. Include all styles and scripts inline.
Produce a polished, self-contained HTML file that acts as {topic}.
Design and code a single HTML file that serves as {topic}. All CSS and JS must be inline.
Implement {topic} as a single self-contained HTML file with embedded styles and scripts.
Build a modern, responsive single-file HTML app for {topic}. No external dependencies.
training_topics: a simple todo list app with add, complete, and delete functionality
a Pomodoro productivity timer with configurable work and break cycles
a kanban board with three columns: To Do, In Progress, and Done
a daily schedule planner with hourly time slots from 6 AM to midnight
a goal tracking page with labelled progress bars and percentage complete
a multi-step form wizard with validation and a progress indicator
a note-taking app with create, edit, delete, and local-storage persistence
a habit streaks tracker with a weekly checkbox grid
a project timeline as an SVG Gantt chart with task bars
a drag-and-drop sortable task list with mouse and touch support
a snake game on a canvas element with score display and restart
a tic-tac-toe game with win detection and a reset button
a memory card matching game with a flip animation
a typing speed test that measures WPM and accuracy
a number guessing game with too-high/too-low hint feedback
a 2048 sliding tile puzzle game with arrow-key controls
a Wordle-clone word guessing game with color-coded letter feedback
a multiple-choice quiz app with score tracking and result summary
a Simon Says pattern memory game with audio cues (mock beep labels)
a breakout/Arkanoid ball-and-paddle game drawn on canvas
a weather dashboard with city search and mock weather cards
a line chart of monthly sales data drawn purely with SVG polylines
a simple analytics dashboard with a bar chart and a donut chart (SVG)
a cryptocurrency price tracker with mock coin data and percentage changes
a stock portfolio summary page with mock ticker symbols and gains/losses
a fitness stats dashboard showing steps, calories burned, and sleep hours
a world time zone clock displaying six cities simultaneously
a BMI calculator with input fields and a color-coded result indicator
a currency converter with mock exchange rates and a swap button
a tip calculator that splits the bill among a configurable number of people
a unit converter supporting length, weight, and temperature
a password strength checker with a meter and a random password generator
a countdown timer to a user-specified date and time
a digital clock with hours, minutes, seconds, and AM/PM display
a color palette generator that derives shades from a user-chosen base color
a simple drawing canvas with a color picker, brush sizes, and an eraser
a Markdown previewer with a split editor and live rendered output panel
a CSS gradient generator with live preview and a copy-to-clipboard button
a regex tester where the user enters a pattern and sample text with live match highlights
a personal portfolio page for a software engineer with projects and contact sections
a minimal blog homepage with three sample posts and a sidebar
a resume / CV page with print-friendly styling and a download-PDF hint
a wedding event invitation page with RSVP form and countdown
a recipe card page with ingredients, step-by-step instructions, and serving size scaler
a book reading list tracker with titles, authors, star ratings, and read/unread status
a travel bucket list page with destination cards and a simple map placeholder
a landing page for a mobile app with hero section, feature highlights, and screenshots
a responsive pricing page with three subscription tiers and feature comparison table
a product detail page with an image carousel, size selector, and add-to-cart button
a simple e-commerce product card grid with category filter chips
a coupon/discount code redemption form with animated success or error state
a newsletter signup page with a form and an animated confirmation message
a dark-mode toggle demo with smooth CSS transition between light and dark themes
a responsive navbar with a hamburger menu that slides in on mobile
a testimonial carousel slider with auto-play and dot navigation
a FAQ accordion page with smooth expand and collapse animations
a modal dialog demo with an overlay backdrop and close-on-click-outside behavior
a sticky header that shrinks and changes background color when the user scrolls down
a skeleton loading screen placeholder that fades to content after a mock delay
a star rating component with hover state and a submitted rating display
a progress bar animation demo with multiple labelled bars animating on page load
a tooltip and popover component demo with multiple trigger elements
a tabbed interface with an animated underline indicator and lazy-loaded tab content
a data table with client-side sorting by column and a search filter input
a multi-select tag input component with keyboard and click support
a floating action button speed-dial menu that expands on click
an image gallery with lazy loading and a blurred placeholder until loaded
a login and register modal demo with client-side form validation
a user profile card with avatar, bio, stats, and a follow/unfollow toggle button
an email inbox UI mockup with read/unread states and a message preview panel
a notification bell icon with a dropdown list of mock notifications
a social media post card with like, comment, and share button interactions
a music player UI mockup with a playlist, progress bar, and play/pause controls
a podcast episode list page with play buttons and episode duration display
a simple image gallery with a lightbox overlay and keyboard navigation
a flashcard deck for learning vocabulary with flip animation and self-assessment buttons
a video streaming homepage UI with mock thumbnail cards and a search bar
an interactive SVG world map with country hover tooltips showing mock population data
a random quote generator that displays a new quote on button click with a share option
a moon phase calendar showing the current month with SVG phase icons

eval_test_cases.instruction: Build a self-contained HTML page for a 7-day weather forecast with SVG bar charts showing daily high/low temperatures and precipitation chance.
Create a single-file HTML website: a pixel art editor with a 16x16 drawing grid, a color palette toolbar, a fill-bucket tool, and a clear button.
Write a complete single-file HTML + CSS + JS website that implements a chat application UI with message bubbles, timestamps, a message input form, and mock sent/received messages.
Generate a responsive single-file HTML website for a mini spreadsheet with editable cells, row and column headers, and a status bar that shows the SUM of selected numeric cells.

Produce a polished, self-contained HTML file that acts as an animated SaaS product landing page with a full-width hero section, three feature cards with icons, a testimonial quote, and a call-to-action button.

Design and code a single HTML file that serves as a browser-based code editor UI with line numbers, a textarea with monospace font, syntax-coloring via CSS classes on sample code, and a Run / Copy button. All CSS and JS must be inline.

Build a modern, responsive single-file HTML app for a habit tracker that displays a GitHub-style contribution heatmap for the past 52 weeks, with a legend and a hover tooltip showing the date and completion count.

Implement a personal monthly budget planner as a single self-contained HTML file with embedded styles and scripts. It should let the user add income and expense entries, show a running balance, and display a live SVG donut chart of spending by category.
